Character Background: One half of the legendary tag team The Archetypes alongside his twin sister L Flux. Will suffered an identity crisis when L was sidelined with a serious knee injury — rather than fight alone, he fled to Hollywood to reinvent himself as a solo star, leveraging his looks and charisma to build a celebrity persona. He returns to NXT as 'The Professor' — a pompous, self-declared genius of the squared circle who believes he has studied and mastered the art of professional wrestling better than anyone alive. Inspired by the swagger of Shawn Michaels and the technical arrogance of AJ Styles, but convinced he surpasses both.
Notes: Twin sibling of L Flux. Former tag team: The Archetypes. Returning simultaneously with L but pursuing a separate singles path. Storylines will remain interconnected. Gimmick: The Professor. NXT debut era — rated 81 (cap 85). Hollywood stint leaned him out — now faster and more technical than his powerhouse Archetype days. Stats profile: high agility, movement speed, reversals, strike precision. Lower strength and durability than L. Inspired by HBK/Dolph/Sami style — fights smart not hard. Will evolve to higher overall as storylines progress.

Character Background: One half of the legendary tag team The Archetypes alongside her twin brother Will Flux. A devastating knee injury forced L out of action and inadvertently sent Will spiraling toward Hollywood. She returns to NXT as 'The Reaper' — dark, methodical, and terrifying. Heavily inspired by The Undertaker's aura and presence, with the explosive in-ring power of Roman Reigns. Technically a heel, but crowds refuse to turn on her. She does things faces shouldn't do and doesn't care what anyone thinks. An unstoppable force returning from the brink.
Notes: Twin sibling of Will Flux. Former tag team: The Archetypes. Returning simultaneously with Will but pursuing a separate singles path. Storylines will remain interconnected. Gimmick: The Reaper. Alignment best described as Tweener — heel in practice, over as a face. NXT debut era — rated 83 (cap 85). Returning from serious knee injury. Stats profile: elite strength and durability, explosive power, high resilience. Inspired by Cena's never-quit toughness, Reigns' explosiveness, Taker's presence and aura. Fights like an unstoppable force. Will evolve to higher overall as storylines progress and knee is fully proven.
